posts.author: rdlumacang (Richard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Workload Widget for Mobile App (both Android and iOS)

What are you trying to achieve

We currently have a Workload view in one of our boards using the Workload widget and it’s been very helpful for the team. Our team is requesting to make it available in the mobile app. Currently, it’s saying it’s only supported in desktop.
